summary: Parallel review: FAIL (6 critical, 1 warning, 1 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: **User value:** the relabel meaningfully distinguishes simplicity-driven blocks in merged reports, while warnings/suggestions still flow to backlog (L255 backlog assertion) and 🔴 still produces FAIL via the verdict path (L312).
- L255 — 🟡 simplicity → plain `[simplicity]`, PASS verdict, backlog=true
- L276 — engineer 🔴 → no veto suffix; global `!merged.includes("veto")` guard
- L286 — mixed 🔴+🟡 in one output → per-line labeling

**Edge cases not asserted (low risk, non-blocking)**: emoji-less critical simplicity finding (no-emoji branch at `flows.mjs:191` with veto label); multiple 🔴 simplicity findings split across separate `findings[]` entries.
